text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 
14 
ghs: RECODE : Rate overall general health 
SAS Format: RTB 
2: VERY GOOD 
3: GOOD 
4: FAIR 
5: POOR 
im_flu1last: RECODE : Had a flu shot since July 1, 2024 
SAS Format: YNA 
1: YES 
2: NO 
im_pneum: RECODE : Ever had Pneumonia shot 
SAS Format: YNA 
1: YES 
2: NO 
ins_employer: RECODE : Other Insurance-Employer, Union 
SAS Format: YNE 
0: NOT CHECKED 
1: CHECKED 
ins_have_oth: RECODE : Have health insurance other than Medicare 
SAS Format: YNA 
1: YES 
2: NO
